hypothesis: Incorporating explicit solvent molecule interactions through a hybrid implicit-explicit solvation scheme during ChEMBL3D dataset generation—where first-shell water molecules are included for polar and charged functional groups—would systematically reduce the energy discrepancy between LoQI-generated solution-phase conformers and protein-bound crystal structures in the Platinum Diverse benchmark, thereby improving median RMSD below 0.40 Å at ensemble size N=250 without retraining the generative architecture.
